items.title: The cockpit is coming online
items.caption: MarketOps update: the local paper-simulation lab now has dashboards, approval queues, signal previews, and a private admin console. Fake-money/sample-data only. In development. Not financial advice.
items.imagePrompt: Dark graphite admin cockpit with approval cards, paper dashboard stats, and ember accents.
items.stillCardLayoutIdea: Single-card layout: headline, 3 system badges, fake-money footer.
items.videoHook: Hook: The lab now has a cockpit.
items.approvalQuestion: Review this x draft for possible later manual posting?

items.title: Fake money, real process
items.caption: The point of MarketOps right now is not real performance. It is process: paper runs, QA checks, risk review, and approval gates before anything gets public. Fake money only. Not financial advice.
items.imagePrompt: Minimal dashboard card showing process pipeline: paper run -> QA -> review -> archive.
items.stillCardLayoutIdea: Horizontal pipeline card with restrained orange arrows.
items.videoHook: Hook: Fake money can still teach real process discipline.
items.approvalQuestion: Review this x draft for possible later manual posting?

items.title: Approval gates before noise
items.caption: MarketOps drafts now route into a local review queue before any public use. YES means manual review later, not auto-posting. Paper simulation only. Not financial advice.
items.imagePrompt: Review queue card stack with clear YES/NO/NEEDS EDIT buttons and no upload icon.
items.videoHook: Hook: The button exists, but the missiles are unplugged.
items.approvalQuestion: Review this x draft for possible later manual posting?

items.title: Signal Desk, research only
items.caption: Signal Desk previews are local research notes, not trade commands. Observation, regime shift, elevated risk, and momentum watch labels stay sandbox-only. Paper simulation. Not financial advice.
items.imagePrompt: Synthetic signal preview card with research-only and sandbox labels.
items.stillCardLayoutIdea: Dark card with signal classification chips.
items.videoHook: Hook: A signal preview is not a command.
items.approvalQuestion: Review this x draft for possible later manual posting?

items.title: Risk-first lab note
items.caption: A blocked sample idea is useful. MarketOps is built to notice weak setups in paper simulation before claims get loud. Fake money. In development. Not financial advice.
items.imagePrompt: Risk Desk block card beside paper equity chart, no real-money claim.
items.stillCardLayoutIdea: Two-panel card: block summary and lesson learned.
items.videoHook: Hook: Sometimes the best result is a clean rejection.
items.approvalQuestion: Review this x draft for possible later manual posting?

items.title: Private admin console
items.caption: MarketOps now has a localhost-only admin console for reviewing paper results, drafts, and approvals. No public exposure, no posting, no broker connection. Fake-money lab only.
items.imagePrompt: Private local admin console on dark workstation, localhost badge visible.
items.approvalQuestion: Review this x draft for possible later manual posting?

items.title: Build-in-public lab milestone
items.caption: MarketOps is turning into a real paper-simulation operations lab: fake-money runs, dashboard bundles, Signal Desk previews, social drafts, and a private approval console. Everything is in development. Nothing here is financial advice.
items.imagePrompt: Square premium tech-lab graphic with dashboard panels and approval queue cards.
items.stillCardLayoutIdea: Carousel: 1 milestone, 2 paper only, 3 review gates, 4 no execution.
items.videoHook: Hook: The lab has a cockpit now.
items.approvalQuestion: Review this instagram draft for possible later manual posting?

items.title: Paper simulation transparency
items.caption: The dashboard is not a victory lap. It is a transparency surface for a fake-money research system while the process is still being built. Paper simulation/sample-data preview only. Not financial advice.
items.imagePrompt: Dark editorial card: sample-data dashboard with transparent disclosure labels.
items.stillCardLayoutIdea: Carousel cover plus three disclosure slides.
items.videoHook: Hook: The useful part is the honesty.
items.approvalQuestion: Review this instagram draft for possible later manual posting?

items.title: Risk Desk matters
items.caption: Risk controls are supposed to interrupt weak ideas. MarketOps uses fake-money runs to make that interruption visible before any public claim gets taken seriously. Paper simulation only. Not financial advice.
items.imagePrompt: Graphite risk-control card with approved/blocked bars and fake-money footer.
items.stillCardLayoutIdea: Carousel: weak idea, risk block, lesson, next review.
items.approvalQuestion: Review this instagram draft for possible later manual posting?

items.title: Signal Desk boundaries
items.caption: MarketOps Signal Desk previews are research labels, not instructions. Observation. Regime shift. Elevated risk. Momentum watch. Everything stays sandbox-only until reviewed. Not financial advice.
items.imagePrompt: Signal taxonomy card with sandbox-only labels and no execution button.
items.stillCardLayoutIdea: Carousel: classifications, research use, no execution, human review.
items.approvalQuestion: Review this instagram draft for possible later manual posting?

items.title: Private review queue
items.caption: Before a MarketOps draft becomes useful outside the lab, it hits local review first. YES, NO, NEEDS EDIT, HOLD, ESCALATE. No auto-posting. No external sending. Fake-money lab only.
items.imagePrompt: Approval queue UI mockup with five local-only decision buttons.
items.stillCardLayoutIdea: Single square card with button row and no external-send badge.
items.approvalQuestion: Review this instagram draft for possible later manual posting?

items.title: No shiny shortcuts
items.caption: MarketOps is intentionally boring where it matters: paper simulation, local QA, risk checks, and human review gates. That is the foundation before anything bigger. In development. Not financial advice.
items.imagePrompt: Dark premium lab bench with checklists, charts, and review cards.
items.stillCardLayoutIdea: Carousel: boring systems, fake money, QA, review.
items.approvalQuestion: Review this instagram draft for possible later manual posting?

items.title: Media pipeline next
items.caption: Next MarketOps media work is prompts and preview cards first: image ideas, short-video hooks, avatar scripts, and brand-safety checks. No uploads, no auto-posting. Paper simulation only.
items.imagePrompt: Media prompt cards arranged beside admin review queue.
items.stillCardLayoutIdea: Grid card showing prompts, captions, and approvals.
items.approvalQuestion: Review this x draft for possible later manual posting?

items.title: Step 0 is stable
items.caption: Step 0 gave MarketOps a local paper engine, office runner, agent reviews, approval queue, and private review console. Step 1 waits for explicit data-provider planning. Fake money only. Not financial advice.
items.imagePrompt: Milestone card with Step 0 complete and Step 1 gated.
items.stillCardLayoutIdea: Timeline card from Step 0 to gated Step 1.
items.videoHook: Hook: Stable baseline before new inputs.
